name: cloud-architecture seed: each scaffolded reading-source file passes the source-file structural validation
command: for f in aws/aws-well-architected aws/aws-architecture-center aws/aws-prescriptive-security azure/azure-well-architected azure/azure-architecture-center azure/azure-cloud-design-patterns gcp/gcp-architecture-framework gcp/gcp-architecture-center hashicorp/terraform-docs us-government/dod-scca us-government/nist-zero-trust linux-foundation/cncf-cloud-native; do bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/validate-source-file.sh" "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/$f.yaml" >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "FAIL invalid $f" 1>&2; exit 1; }; done; echo all-valid 1>&2
